licence: Singapore Open Data Licence for NParks/LTA; ODbL for OpenStreetMap

transform.featureOrdering: upstream feature order, then MultiLineString member order

pcn.name: Park Connector Loop
pcn.delta: Current upstream still flattens to 1,177 lines; 1,020 geometries/properties match the production feature at the same index. Remaining differences are upstream source revisions and require map review before adoption.

cpn.name: Cycling Path Network (GEOJSON)
cpn.delta: Current upstream still flattens to 8,527 lines; 8,239 complete features match production. There are 288 candidate-only and 288 production-only features, including one upstream record with no CYL_PATH that is made explicit as Unspecified. All differences require map review before adoption.

rail.name: Rail Corridor
rail.query: current relation 3871697 member ways with tags and geometry; production remains the reviewed 2026-07-17 snapshot until a current rebuild is approved
rail.delta: Production has 71 reviewed lines. The current relation rebuild has 82: 38 exact matches, 44 candidate-only and 33 production-only. This is an explicit source-data delta held for manual status, ordering and continuity review.

adoptionRule: Never copy a rebuild over production data automatically. Review the report, rendered geometry, metadata/count/length deltas, licences, fixed routing fixtures and release risk first.

freshness.policy: Days since the source snapshot was captured. warnAfterDays is a soft reminder; failAfterDays blocks release until the source is re-checked against data.gov.sg / OSM. Per-source overrides may tighten either threshold.

closures.policy: A closure with an ISO end date that has passed is a release-blocking staleness signal. A closure with an open-ended end date (for example ~2028) must be re-verified against the official source at least every reviewIntervalDays; bump lastReviewedOn when you re-confirm it.

graph.base: OpenStreetMap via build/build_graph.py (raw OSM ways minus expressways, contracted)
graph.fusion: build/fuse_graph.mjs — gap-fill of NParks PCN, LTA CPN and the open rail corridor into the routable graph (COVER=18m, WELD=35m)
graph.licence: OpenStreetMap ODbL; NParks/LTA under the Singapore Open Data Licence
graph.note: Derived artifact (OSM base + fused official geometry); a full rebuild needs the raw OSM download, so graph.json is not reproducible from the repository alone.

crossings.base: OpenStreetMap via Overpass (waterway=river|canal; highway cycle/foot ways with tunnel=yes) intersected/matched with data/pcn.lines.geojson + data/cpn.lines.geojson
crossings.licence: OpenStreetMap ODbL; NParks/LTA cycling network under the Singapore Open Data Licence
crossings.note: Route-annotation points only (bridges over rivers/canals; road underpasses on the PCN), not a map layer. Derived artifact needing a live Overpass fetch, so like graph.json it is not reproducible from the repository alone; the committed snapshot is the reviewed one.
